meaning: adj.(天气等)宜于飞行的,适航的 (飞机等)可以飞行的,可驾驶的
examples: It is now in flyable storage in Fort Worth.
Here's one of only two flyable B-24 Liberator bombers left in the world.
Alternatively, when the detachable wing is attached with the body, the body in conjunction with the detachable wing operates as a flyable kite.
Still, the Army purchased a few aircraft from Boeing as test planes, and some insiders remained convinced that the aircraft was flyable.
